name: Functional - Successful Single Document Upload and Processing
description: Validates that a user with the 'user' role can successfully upload a supported document (e.g., PDF), have its text extracted, classified, fields extracted, and receive a successful UploadResponse.
input: A valid PDF file containing a recognizable HR document, user_role='user', employee_id='E12345'.
output: A JSON response with success=True, document_type set, confidence >= 0.85, extracted_fields present, and no errors.
